name: Tuna Lemon Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 Can Tuna (6 1/8 oz), drained and flaked
1/2 Teaspoon Dried lemon pepper seasoning or dried basil or dill
recipeInstructions:
1. In a serving bowl, combine the pasta shells with the tuna.
2. To prepare the sauce, in a small saucepan combine all remaining ingredients except scallions, stirring until cornstarch is dissolved.
3. Bring the sauce to a boil, stirring constantly. Continue to boil for 1 minute, stirring occasionally. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Pour the sauce over the tuna and shells, stirring gently to coat. Sprinkle with scallions.
Makes 2 servings
Preparation and cook time: 20 minutes
